reviewedChanges: All nine card sourceVerifiedAt values moved to 2026-07-23 after official-source review.
DBS Black Q2 is historical and Q3 is active through 2026-10-05, but its welcome is engine-gated because the official total includes basic DBS$.
HSBC EveryMile July flash is separated from the annual base welcome, is mobile-payment-only, and remains active through 2026-07-31; the official HSBCFLASH code is retained.
HSBC and DBS conditional overseas HK$2-per-mile promotions are first-class official records with registration, spend gates and caps, but remain excluded from the unchanged Engine.
HSBC Visa Signature base welcome is corrected for new versus existing customers while the card remains reference-only.
DBS Q3 eligibility, DAYCROWN alternative, Flexi component and issuer-funded existing-customer HK$50 are structured without misclassifying the HK$50 as a MoneyHero platform bonus.
American Express Explorer 26,000 marketed miles retain the official HK$15,000 local-spend and registration conditions and remain marked as a legacy-model conflict.
Channel rewards are split into conditional platform bonus, issuer claim, random reward, promo code, conditions, exact Hong Kong cut-off time and stackability; unknown records are inactive.
Four MrMiles records preserve 88 MM Credit as a conditional maximum of 38 for new platform members plus 50 after successful approval and form submission, not a fixed reward for everyone.
Historical MrMiles and MoneyHero American Express Platinum records are retained.
